name: shell-minimal
title: Minimal shell (topbar)
description: A sticky topbar (brand + horizontal nav + theme toggle) over a centered content container. No sidebar. For simpler apps that don't need the full DocShell. Includes density + theme + toasts.
postInstall: Wire <ShellProviders><AppShell>{children}</AppShell></ShellProviders> into your root (Next.js: src/app/layout.tsx, Vite: src/App.tsx).
Edit src/lib/nav.ts to set your routes.
Edit the brand (logo + name) in the <Brand> component in src/components/app-shell.tsx.
